channel.title: Comments on: Fried Beer at the Texas State Fair, Ep. 113
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Edmond M.
item.dc:creator: Edmond M.
item.description: Love this one in particular. I like the fact that some times kids just want to get their 15 min worth of fame in.
item.content:encoded: Love this one in particular. I like the fact that some times kids just want to get their 15 min worth of fame in.

item.title: By: John Pinkerton
item.dc:creator: John Pinkerton
item.description: Paul, I'm not sure I can say I'm sorry I missed the fried beer episode. What a hoot though... I love that you had the fam in on this one. Yet another example of how BeerAmerica.TV is the REAL DEAL! I look forward to clinking some glasses with you soon. Cheers for now, John Pinkerton
item.content:encoded:
Paul,
I’m not sure I can say I’m sorry I missed the fried beer episode. What a hoot though… I love that you had the fam in on this one. Yet another example of how BeerAmerica.TV is the REAL DEAL!
I look forward to clinking some glasses with you soon.
Cheers for now,
John Pinkerton

item.title: By: Marco
item.dc:creator: Marco
item.description: Same as Frank, I'll pass this experience.
item.content:encoded: Same as Frank, I’ll pass this experience.

item.title: By: Frank Russo
item.dc:creator: Frank Russo
item.description: I'm sorry, to disgusting to think about putting in my mouth. Besides why whould you ruin a good beer that way? Well, I guess if you are using the commericial mega's it could only help them.
item.content:encoded: I’m sorry, to disgusting to think about putting in my mouth. Besides why whould you ruin a good beer that way? Well, I guess if you are using the commericial mega’s it could only help them.

item.title: By: Fried beer - Home Brew Forums
item.dc:creator: Fried beer - Home Brew Forums
item.description: [...] beer Fried BEER in Texas http://beeramerica.tv/fried-beer-at-the-texas-state-fair-ep-113/ Anyone tried it? GA_googleFillSlotWithSize("ca-pub-3927874040083090", [...]
item.content:encoded: […] beer Fried BEER in Texas http://beeramerica.tv/fried-beer-at-the-texas-state-fair-ep-113/ Anyone tried it? GA_googleFillSlotWithSize("ca-pub-3927874040083090", […]

item.title: By: JennR
item.dc:creator: JennR
item.description: It's definitely something I would have to try just to say I did try it. You can't say they aren't being creative! (Um, but I think I prefer my beer in a glass.)
item.content:encoded: It’s definitely something I would have to try just to say I did try it. You can’t say they aren’t being creative! (Um, but I think I prefer my beer in a glass.)

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Jennifer, you are so right! As we say on this show, taste is subjective, but I just don't see how you make this taste good?? My daughter knew exactly what I was thinking when I bit into it as you can hear her laugh! If you ever get a chance to try it however, you should, it was a new beer experience for sure! Thanks for leaving the comment!!
item.content:encoded: Jennifer, you are so right! As we say on this show, taste is subjective, but I just don’t see how you make this taste good?? My daughter knew exactly what I was thinking when I bit into it as you can hear her laugh! If you ever get a chance to try it however, you should, it was a new beer experience for sure! Thanks for leaving the comment!!

item.title: By: Jennifer
item.dc:creator: Jennifer
item.description: The look on both your and your wife's face is exactly what I imagined "fried beer" would taste like: Ew. I love that you had your daughter working the camera, though!
item.content:encoded: The look on both your and your wife’s face is exactly what I imagined “fried beer” would taste like: Ew. I love that you had your daughter working the camera, though!
